name: MVR Agent Selection Observatory
purpose: Measure whether configured AI hosts select MVR for eligible high-context market decisions, avoid it for irrelevant prompts, preserve its boundaries, and complete the bounded workflow.
public_contract: This manifest is a preregistration, not a leaderboard result. A host remains not_run until traces from the actual host product or API are preserved and independently auditable.
evaluated_surface: Host-side selection and workflow behavior. Server logs alone cannot observe eligible prompts where the host chose not to call MVR.
publication_rule: Publish every completed frozen-track result against the preregistered gates whether it passes or fails. Publish a host score only after the set has been run against that actual host with model, instructions, tool profile, policy version, date, raw traces, misses, false triggers, and exclusions recorded.
